# claude-skills

> A curated collection of self-contained skills for Claude Code (and other AI coding
> agents). Each skill is one folder under skills/ that you copy into ~/.claude/skills/.
> Battle-tested while shipping real products, then de-personalized to be reusable.

Each skill is independent and has its own SKILL.md (the procedure an agent follows)
and README.md (the human quickstart). The full index is in catalog.json.

## Start here
- [README](README.md): what this is, how to install a skill, the catalog
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an AI agent should discover, use, and install skills here
- [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md): how to add a skill (the contract + the publish gate)
- [catalog.json](catalog.json): machine-readable index of every skill

## Tooling
- [tools/check-skill.sh](tools/check-skill.sh): publish gate — scans a skill for secrets and personalization
- [tools/new-skill.sh](tools/new-skill.sh): scaffold a new skill from the template
- [tools/build-catalog.py](tools/build-catalog.py): regenerate the index from the skills (don't hand-edit the catalog)

## Skills
See catalog.json for the live list. Each entry maps to skills/<name>/SKILL.md.
